examples: Social structures are not discrete objects; they overlap and interweave.
Complex family relationships interweave with a murder plot in this ambitious new novel.
To connect by or as if by lacing together; interweave.
Hubbard wants students to better understand how decision-making and ethics interweave across disciplines and sectors.
All these plot lines interweave and tauten right up to the unbearable romantic tension of the climax.
